reviews.review_description: This game was genuinely a really good game, I couldn’t get into a server i don’t think anyone was online, but the games was really good, didn’t get to see the monster much, but ima get some of my friends to download it🥹
The game is genuinely so good the owners and mods are nice and it's great if you want to be peaceful cause there's no racist little kids.i do recommend playing.

reviews.review_title: Best inspired game of animal compay
reviews.review_description: The game is just good like the mods in this game are amazing great game overall if i could rate this six stars i would
The game is pretty good and fun but it needs to have more death animations and you should be able to see bundles and items and a sign that describes the item

developer_response.body: Great Ideas! I will definitely take this ideas into consideration. Thanks! - RandomStick

reviews.review_description: This game is the best ever, thanks to its dedicated developers who put in a lot of hard work.
